counters.description: champ annoying (dont fight early) most games should be winnable tho
fiora is a lane bully, a skill based match up that favors her. she is annoying but if you play slow you win around 3rd item spike.
doesnt have kill pressure unless you int and give it to him, dont ask for ganks, just sit and farm for late
annoying laning faze, your best bet is hitting an e, then playing around your w.
you cant really fight this guy, he will fuck you in lane but it doesnt matter cause the champ is shit later. hes too one dimensional to be any threat late.
sett annoying, start e and play back till ult, dodge his w and kite using your own and you should just win.
you dont win lane unless you do. late you can poopy on him. idk kled is boring match up but once you get ahead in the mid game he cant really play the video game.

annoying fucker. start e and play back, he is strong all through out the game but you have a good chance to 1v1 him after grudge buy. if you are behind dont let him snowball or else he will be an issue late.
depends on your elo. riven mains are either good or shit, no in-between. good rivens will punish your w if you use it wrong. start e and play back early. dont ban if below emerald

synergies.description: can pretend to be goons or maiden in side lane
fun if you are getting perma ganks, she is best tower diver in the game (maybe voli better)
maybe, just maybe, when a champ is locked down in your w; a jhin player might actually hit an ult (for the very first time in their lives).
provides vision on enemies with ult (disgustingly broken most games)
any split pusher mid wont really help you, you want to be the only one splitting, let your team group and fight
